creator: rdenis@simphalempin.com
text:
Selon Emanuel Haupt <ehaupt@FreeBSD.org>:

> Synopsis: [MAINTAINER] Unbreak net/ndisc6 on 4.x

> With the latest patch you marked it broken on 4.x and still have just one
> master
> site. Was that the intention?

Hmm, my intention was that both the latest and the previous one be applied.
Also, the patch in files/ should be moved to CVS Attic, since it's been
merged upstream.

Sorry for the confusion.

-- 
Remi Denis-Courmont
http://www.simphalempin.com/home/
